topStories.description: The petition had sought a judicial direction to the Union government, Central Zoo Authority, Directorate General of Foreign Trade and the Wildlife Crime Control Bureau to produce the entire record of the permissions, recognitions and import/export licences granted to the rescue and rehabilitation centre and the welfare trust since 2019

topStories.title: Denmark planned to blow up Greenland runways if US invaded, reports say
topStories.description: Denmark's public broadcaster reports that the US operation to seize Venezuela's leader sparked fears it would act against Greenland.

topStories.title: US civil rights leader Cesar Chavez accused of sexual abuse
topStories.description: The allegations have prompted the cancellations of events and celebrations planned in his honour later this month.

topStories.title: 16 US Military Aircraft Destroyed Since Start Of Iran War
topStories.description: Five other KC-135s were reportedly damaged by an Iranian missile strike while parked at an airfield in Saudi Arabia.

topStories.title: FIFA details Infantino’s $6m deal with 33% Club World Cup bonus increase
topStories.description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino's pay boost revealed in latest accounts that target $14bn in revenue for 2027-30.

topStories.title: Donald Trump rules out US ground troops in Iran conflict amid escalating Middle East tensions: ‘I am not putting…’
topStories.description: Donald Trump's comments counter recent reports suggesting the administration is weighing reinforcements, including thousands of additional personnel to secure key areas like the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Israel PM Netanyahu’s Iran war briefing: 15 major points
topStories.description: Netanyahu outlined Israel’s military achievements, Iran’s weakened nuclear and missile capabilities, the potential need for ground operations, and his close coordination with President Trump, while dismissing claims that Israel dragged the US into war.

topStories.title: Employees had to restrain a dancing humanoid robot after it went wild at a California restaurant
topStories.description: A dancing robot in a Haidilao hot pot restaurant boogied down a little too hard.

dailyNews.title: US intelligence chief admits US, Israel not aligned on Iran war goals
dailyNews.description: The US Director of National ‌Intelligence says American and Israeli goals in the war on Iran are not the same.

dailyNews.title: Failure to earn profits in film not cheating: SC
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court ruled that movie making is high-risk and failing to earn profits doesn't equate to cheating, quashing a criminal case against a producer.

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in attack on Iranian gas field
dailyNews.description: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.

dailyNews.title: How will Israel’s decades-long assassination policy continue?
dailyNews.description: Senior Iranian figures have been targeted and killed since the start of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: US F-35 aircraft makes emergency landing after a combat mission over Iran
dailyNews.description: The F-35 fighter jet landed safely and the pilot is in stable condition, CENTCOM spokesman Captain Tim Hawkins said.

dailyNews.title: Trump compares Iran strikes to Pearl Harbor as he meets Japan’s PM
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump stunned Japan’s Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi when he compared strikes on Iran to Pearl Harbor.

dailyNews.title: US F-35 makes emergency landing at its air base in Middle East after suspected Iranian strike: Report
dailyNews.description: The stealth aircraft was conducting a combat mission over Iran when the incident reportedly occurred.

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu Says Israel Will Stop Attacks On Iranian Gas Field
dailyNews.description: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu said that at the request of President Trump, Israel will hold off on any further attacks on the Iranian gas field.

dailyNews.title: US approves $16.5bn arms deal to Gulf states amid rising Iran tensions
dailyNews.description: The proposed deal includes the sale of drones, missiles and radars for Gulf allies, including UAE, Kuwait and Jordan.

dailyNews.title: Why the US Homeland Security shutdown is raising fears of airport delays
dailyNews.description: Hundreds of TSA workers have resigned over unpaid wages, as Congress weighs funding the Department of Homeland Security.

dailyNews.title: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu declares Iran can't enrich uranium or build missiles anymore
dailyNews.description: Earlier Israeli and US actions, including strikes in June 2025, damaged major uranium enrichment sites like Natanz and Fordow, rendering them largely inoperable.

dailyNews.title: US considers lifting sanctions on some Iranian oil
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent broached waiving sanctions on oil already at sea, which would be a stunning reversal of longstanding American policy.

dailyNews.title: Trump defends $200B Pentagon request for Iran war; calls it ‘small price’ for national security
dailyNews.description: “This is a very volatile world,” Trump said from the Oval Office. “The emergency spending would be a very small price to pay to ensure the nation’s military stays in top shape.”

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Pearl Harbor comment leaves Japan PM Takaichi speechless | Watch Video
dailyNews.description: Responding to a question on why allies were not informed in advance, Trump emphasised the element of surprise in military operations. “We wanted surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?” Trump said.

dailyNews.title: Trump references Pearl Harbor during meeting with Japanese PM on Iran war
dailyNews.description: US president said that Japan was 'stepping up to the plate' to support the US war without offering details.

dailyNews.title: Trump meets Japan PM Sanae Takaichi at White House amid US-Iran war, Hormuz Strait crisis: What's on agenda?
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump welcomed Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to the White House on Thursday for a summit. Takaichi's visit comes amid tensions in the Middle East after the US and Israel launched a war with Iran. Here's what's expected from the meeting.

dailyNews.title: Duffy mocks Newsom’s ‘bridges to nowhere’ as California wildlife crossing overruns by $21M
dailyNews.description: Animal crossing bridge in California faces delays and cost overruns as Newsom blames Trump tariffs for $114 million project originally set at $92 million.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' guest host praises Trump economy as panel blasts admin for rising prices amid Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen says rising gas prices from the Iran conflict are likely temporary, but "The View" but multiple co-hosts objected to such speculation.

dailyNews.title: Dems face reckoning after putting deceased labor leader on pedestal as sexual abuse allegations emerge
dailyNews.description: Years of White House proclamations and Democratic praise for Cesar Chavez are now under fresh scrutiny after abuse allegations prompted allies to back away.

dailyNews.title: Trump downplays Iran war's impact on global energy prices
dailyNews.description: Hosting the prime minister of Japan in the Oval Office, President Trump downplayed the Iran war's impact on global energy prices. But gas prices are continuing to climb as the Defense Department asks for more funding. Weijia Jiang has the latest.

dailyNews.title: What is Trump's primary focus with Cuba?
dailyNews.description: President Trump says Cuba is next after launching operations in both Venezuela and Iran this year. American University professor William LeoGrande joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Tulsi Gabbard says Iranian leadership's intentions are "less certain" than before war
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard was back on Capitol Hill on Thursday, discussing the worldwide threat assessment. Ian Bremmer, president and founder of the Eurasia Group, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Complaint About Israeli Strike on Gas Field Exposes Divergent Strategies
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he told Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel he disapproved of the attack, which sent energy markets reeling. But Israeli officials said the Americans were informed beforehand.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Won’t Send Troops to Iran But Leaves Wiggle Room
dailyNews.description: The president was cagey about his plans for Iran. He confirmed the Pentagon was seeking $200 billion to support a protracted war effort while also claiming it would be over soon.

dailyNews.title: Trump Jokes About Pearl Harbor in Meeting With Japan’s Leader
dailyNews.description: Breaking a taboo, President Trump needled Japan’s prime minister about the World War II attack, as she widened her eyes and appeared to take a deep breath in the Oval Office.
